_comment: Example durable registry. Copy to $DOD_HOME/registry.json (or run `dod init`) and edit. dod only READS this file; it writes adopted/ad-hoc entries to local.json. Each entry is BOTH the launch contract and the docs. Prefer ABSOLUTE cwd paths (dod is cross-project; there is no single repo root).

entries.name: Hello (example)
entries.blurb: A trivial static file server, just to prove dod can launch + frame a dashboard.
entries.why: Replace this with your real dashboards. cmd is an argv LIST (never a shell string).

entries.name: Some external app (example)
entries.blurb: A dashboard whose lifecycle dod does NOT own — it only adopts/frames it.
entries.why: type web-external + empty cmd = adopt-only: start it yourself, dod renders the running port. stop:leave means dod never kills it.
